mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_follow_up_record ( follow_up_plan_id, register_id, symptom_relief, has_side_effect, patient_feedback, ai_assessment, follow_up_time ) VALUES ( #{followUpPlanId}, #{registerId}, #{symptomRelief}, #{hasSideEffect}, #{patientFeedback}, #{aiAssessment}, COALESCE(#{followUpTime}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) )
mapper.select: SELECT r.id FROM register r WHERE ( r.patient_id = #{patientId} OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM patient p WHERE p.id = #{patientId} AND p.delmark = 0 AND p.real_name = r.real_name AND p.birthdate = r.birthdate ) ) ORDER BY r.visit_date DESC NULLS LAST, r.id DESC
